prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PAPERCUT-KIT Product Type: SCISSORS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: ToolTreaux Paper Cutting Kit Hobby Knives Hook Set Scissors Tweezers Description: Complete your paper crafts with the Universal Tool Ultimate Paper Cutting Kit.

This kit comes with everything you'll need for your scrapbooking or other paper cutting projects. In the kit we've included a 16pc precision hobby knife tool set, 5 precision tweezers and a pair of scissors to make paper cutting simple and precise.

Additionally we've included a set of 4 hooks as well as a 9" x 7.5" cutting mat with measurements so you can make sure you're cutting the correct amount every time. The mat is even self healing, so you'll be able to rely on for all of your projects. Make sure to grab this kit to add to your crafting and DiY tools. Search Terms: art project home DIY scrap booking paper cutter kit Features: - Universal Tool Paper Cutting Kit - 9 x 7.5 Inch Cutting Mat - Hobby Knife Tool Set - Tweezers, Scissors, and Hook Set Included! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
